Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Wind aura]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Wind aura can be used to power weapons or fuel boundary formations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Wind aura can be used to make objects drift on cushions of air.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan used wind aura to open the doors.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — The silver bell's chimes sent wind aura rippling.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — The iron plates are suspended on wind aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Wind aura is present in the trees.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Saeya uses wind aura to float a trunk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Underlord used wind aura to control a falling box.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon manipulates wind aura to keep his eyes and mouth clear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon can use wind aura to manipulate objects.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Wind aura can cushion a fall.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon has the five-tailed snowfox bound up in wind aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon called Midnight with wind aura.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — A Ruler technique controlled the wind aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Noroloth’s Remnant was attempting to mimic wind aura.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Wind aura is a strong, vivid green in the current location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Wind aura is used for propulsion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Dreadgod takes control of the wind aura in the area.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Li Markuth uses wind aura to summon dark clouds.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon used wind aura to block sound.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
